about.title: About Inaya Domestic
about.subtitle: Your trusted domestic services partner in Ajman
about.p1: Inaya Domestic is a leading domestic worker and maid services provider based in Ajman, UAE. We connect families with trained, verified and reliable domestic staff.
about.p2: From live-in maids and nannies to cooks, elder care and recruitment services, we handle every detail including visa assistance, background verification and replacement guarantees.
about.mission: To make hiring trusted domestic help simple, safe and affordable for families in Ajman.
about.vision: To be the most trusted domestic services brand in the region, known for quality staff and honest service.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about our services
faq.q1: How do I book a maid service?
faq.a1: Simply fill the booking form or contact us. Our team will confirm availability and arrange the service.
faq.a2: Yes. Every worker goes through background verification and training before placement.
faq.q3: Do you offer a replacement guarantee?
faq.a3: Yes. If you are not satisfied, we provide a free replacement as per our policy.
faq.q4: Do you help with maid visa and sponsorship?
faq.a4: Yes. We provide full maid visa assistance and sponsorship transfer services.
faq.a5: Our service team is currently focused on Ajman. Contact us to confirm availability for your requirement.
